              shared workspace with live cursors, presence indicators, and concurrent editing.
              Features include role-based access control, shared agents and workflows, and team
              workspace management.

apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/featur.sim_s_workspace_includes_four_core:
Sim's workspace includes four core features: Chat, an AI command center for
              natural-language control of your entire workspace; Tables, a built-in database for
              filtering, sorting, and wiring data directly into workflows; Files, a shared document
              store for uploading, creating, and sharing documents, spreadsheets, and media across
              teams and agents; and Logs, full execution tracing with inputs, outputs, cost, and
              duration for every run.
apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/featur.build_agents_connect_your_data_and: Build agents, connect your data, and monitor every run, all in one workspace.

apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/templa.pre_built_workflow_templates_covering_oc:
pre-built workflow templates covering OCR
          processing, release management, meeting follow-ups, resume scanning, email triage,
          competitor monitoring, social listening, data enrichment, feedback analysis, code review,
          and knowledge base Q&A. Each template connects real integrations and LLMs; pick one,
          customise it, and deploy in minutes.
apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/templa.pre_built_templates_for_every_use: Pre-built templates for every use case: pick one, swap
apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/templa.models_and_tools_to_fit_your: models and tools to fit your stack, and deploy.

apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/hero/h.sim_is_the_open_source_ai:
Sim is the open-source AI workspace where teams build, deploy, and manage AI agents. Connect
        1,000+ integrations and every major LLM, including OpenAI, Anthropic Claude, Google Gemini,
        Mistral, and xAI Grok, to create agents that automate real work. Build agents visually with
        the workflow builder, conversationally through Chat, or programmatically with the API.
        Trusted by over 100,000 builders at startups and Fortune 500 companies. SOC2 compliant.
apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/hero/h.sim_is_the_ai_workspace_for: Sim is the AI Workspace for Agent Builders

apps/sim/app/(landing)/components/pricin.sim_pricing_community_plan_is_free:
Sim pricing: Community plan is free with 1,000 credits, 5GB storage, and 1 personal
            workspace. Pro plan is $25 per month with 6,000 credits, 50GB storage, and up to 3
            personal workspaces. Max plan is $100 per month with 25,000 credits, 500GB storage, and
            up to 10 personal workspaces. Enterprise pricing is custom with unlimited shared
            workspaces, SSO, SCIM, SOC2 compliance, self-hosting, and dedicated support. All plans
            include CLI, SDK, and MCP access.
